from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

def task_func(df):
    # Standardize numeric columns in the DataFrame
    scaler = StandardScaler()
    df_std = df.copy().fillna(df.mean())  # Fill missing values with the column average
    df_std[df.select_dtypes(include='number').columns] = scaler.fit_transform(df_std[df.select_dtypes(include='number')])

    # Calculate correlation matrix and plot heatmap
    corr = df_std.corr()
    heatmap_axes = sns.heatmap(data=corr, cmap="coolwarm", annot=True)

    return df_std, heatmap_axes
